text:
Sufika (スフィカ, Sufika) is a mysterious girl that only appears in the mobile game, Greed Adventure. She holds the key to unraveling the mysteries of "Greed Island 2".

Appearance

Sufika has the appearance of a young girl. She has blonde hair and crimson eyes. The gem on her head is usually cyan but changes color in accordance with her mood. Dark blue when upset; purple when confused or in the process of thinking; light red when in good spirits; dark red when angry; and gold when administrative powers are used. The gem and her eyes turned to gold when she was captured and controlled by Shalnark.

Personality

Although Sufika isn't human, she developed an ego and strong personality that made even Killua believe she was a real player, not an NPC. She was created to collect information, so she is curious by nature. Sufika also deeply cares about her friends. She is very strong-willed and maintains her consciousness when Gon and Killua were in danger despite being manipulated by Shalnark. In the comics, Sufika sometimes appears absent-minded; however, she easily confronts any opponents and speaks her mind when she sees something unlawful or wrong, such as Morel using his pipe in a non-smoking zone. She admires Knuckle's haircut, going as far as trying it herself, and immediately bonds with him. She empathizes with Kalluto, imagining him cutting out his paper confetti in a small candle-lit room. She is also not intimated by the other Zoldyck Family members, as she is seen casually doing BBQ with Silva and Zeno, much to Killua's surprise. She has also casually played card games with Hisoka. Despite her bravery on most occasions, she fell over in shock after a jump scare from Neferpitou.

Background

A man from the Hunter Association assists Battera in producing an A.I. of Battera's Lover that is created from his memories, but after a short interaction, Battera suddenly stops visiting. The A.I. believes Battera left because its lack of an ego. The Hunter Association man encourages the A.I. to become "Mother" and build up G.I.2. After the launch of Greed Island 2; the Mother creates children to send throughout the island to collect knowledge, experience, and memories of the players to help the Mother obtain an ego. Sometime after the children were released, one child was known as "Individual Identification Name: Sufika" and did not return to their Mother. A return command signal was sent out, but a manipulated technician stated that Sufika ignored the signal, and it was determined that she had developed an ego.

Sufika later reveals that she had gone through the Greed Island records, and upon coming across the records of Gon and Killua, she wanted to go on an adventure with them and know more about them. To discover the reason for these thoughts and what she felt, she created the scenario allowing her to meet them.

Plot

Greed Island 2

Summary

Around Sufika, many quests of incredible difficulty frequently occur, even for a game meant to serve as a Hunter training facility. You, Gon, and Killua struggle to keep up. Despite being a beginner, Sufika often uses complicated and incomprehensible speech and behaves mysteriously regarding the game. In addition, the Phantom Troupe is tenaciously pursuing her...

Chapter 1

At the starting point, a man asks if you (the player, a beta tester for G.I.2) have seen a mysterious girl. You haven't, so the man leaves. Soon after, a blond girl approaches you, out of breath, and asks if you can help her. The man from before comes back. After seeing the girl in distress, you decide to protect her. The man assumes that you have been protecting her and calls out his Book. The girl is clearly confused. Gon and Killua intervene, and the man takes off after seeing their strength. Gon asks if you and the girl are beginners, to which you're both surprised that he knows. Gon and Killua explain that they could tell based on your reaction to the man's "Book" and how experienced players would have called out their own Book in response. After thanking Gon and Killua for their help, the mysterious girl introduces herself as Sufika. Gon offers to take you and Sufika to the nearest town. Killua comments on how weird Sufika looks, but Sufika's response clears his suspicions of her being an NPC.
